info_metaid.description: Get MetaID user info by metaId (name, address, avatar, chatpubkey, etc.). Use when user asks for a metaID's name, address, or profile.

info_address.description: Get MetaID user info by wallet address.

pin_detail.description: Get Pin detail by Pin number or Pin Id (content, preview, metaid, path, etc.).

pin_version.description: Get a specific version of a Pin by pinId and version (0=initial, >=1=edit history).

pin_list_global.description: Paginated list of all Pins (global). Use page and size.

pin_list_by_path.description: List Pins by protocol path (e.g. /protocols/simplebuzz for Buzz, /protocols/simplegroupchat). Required: path. Optional: size (1-100), cursor.

pin_list_by_metaid.description: List Pins by MetaID and optional path (e.g. path=/protocols/simplebuzz for a user's Buzz). Required: metaid. Optional: path, size, cursor.

pin_list_by_address.description: List Pins by wallet address and path. Required: address, path. Optional: size, cursor.

block_list.description: Paginated list of blocks with Pins (page, size).

notification_list.description: Get notifications for a wallet address. Required: address. Optional: lastId, size (max 100).

debug_count.description: Get global counts (pin, block, metaId, app).

content_by_id.description: Get Pin content by PinId (text/JSON string, or base64 image, or video HTML). Returns raw content; not JSON.

indexer_info_metaid.description: Get MetaID info from metafile-indexer by metaId or globalMetaId (name, address, avatar, chatpubkey).

indexer_info_address.description: Get MetaID info from metafile-indexer by address.

indexer_info_globalmetaid.description: Get MetaID info by globalMetaID from metafile-indexer.

indexer_info_search.description: Search users by keyword (metaid or name). Params: keyword, keytype=metaid|name, limit (default 10). Returns raw array.

indexer_file_by_pin.description: Get file metadata by PinId from metafile-indexer (path, content_type, creator_meta_id, content_url, etc.).

indexer_file_latest.description: Get latest file version by firstPinId from metafile-indexer.

indexer_files_by_creator.description: List files by creator address. Params: address, cursor, size.

indexer_files_by_metaid.description: List files by creator metaId or globalMetaId. Params: metaid, cursor, size.

indexer_files_by_extension.description: List files by extension (e.g. .jpg). Params: extension, timestamp, size.

indexer_files_metaid_extension.description: List files by metaId and extension. Params: metaid, extension, timestamp, size.

indexer_user_by_metaid.description: Get user info by MetaID from metafile-indexer.

indexer_user_by_address.description: Get user info by address from metafile-indexer.

indexer_pin_by_id.description: Get Pin info by PinId from metafile-indexer.

indexer_status.description: Get metafile-indexer sync status (chains, current_sync_height, latest_block_height).
